comments: Rejected. git show b392350 matches the execution-result artifact: implementation_changes only lists src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts, and artifact_changes only list tasks/v0.5-m4-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.5-m4-result-review-packet.json. The implementation file is a stdio MCP client and appears read-only, and it prints server/client errors instead of swallowing them. However, the execution contract requires the script to print/assert results to prove the Context API works; this client only logs responses, uses permissive any-typed results, continues after tool/server errors, and exits 0 without asserting that get_dispatch_state and get_execution_diff succeeded. That means the contract's validation/proof requirement is not met even though file/artifact boundaries were respected.
